cases_page.cta_title: Your project could be our next success story.
cases_page.cta_desc: Tell us your application scenario and we'll design a tailored solution.

about_page.hero_desc: An unmanned systems integrator focused on real-world deployment. Own-brand products + curated industry hardware. You describe the scenario — AURA handles the rest.
about_page.mission_desc1: Unmanned systems can do far more than most people realize — inspection, security, delivery, agriculture, emergency response… every scenario has real pain points waiting to be solved. The technology is already there. What's missing is someone to actually put it to work.
about_page.mission_desc2: AURA is an unmanned systems integrator. We have our own air, ground, and water products, and we rigorously select the best-value supporting equipment on the market. Customers don't need to know drone model numbers or compare specs — just tell us the problem, and we handle everything else.
about_page.mission_desc3: Our goal is simple: get unmanned systems truly deployed in more industries and more places around the world.

advantages.title: Customized Solutions
advantages.desc: Every client's scenario is unique. We configure product combinations from the ground up — no generic packages, no one-size-fits-all.

advantages.title: End-to-End Delivery
advantages.desc: From needs assessment and solution design to equipment supply and deployment support — full coverage, one point of contact.

advantages.title: University-Backed Technology
advantages.desc: Co-developed with Northwestern Polytechnical University. Solid technical depth to tackle complex system integration challenges.

advantages.title: Highly Competitive Pricing
advantages.desc: Our complete supply chain enables us to deliver high-performance solutions at highly competitive prices, helping clients control project costs.

footer.tagline: AIR · GROUND · WATER     SMART SYSTEMS. REAL IMPACT.

scenariosMeta.title: Inspection & Security
scenariosMeta.subtitle: INSPECTION & SECURITY
scenariosMeta.description: Air-ground coordination for 24/7 coverage. UAVs and ground robots work in sync with AI camera networks to build a layered security grid, cutting labor costs by over 60%.

scenariosMeta.title: Smart Campus
scenariosMeta.subtitle: SMART CAMPUS
scenariosMeta.description: One unmanned system covering all campus scenarios — from security patrol to parcel delivery. Inspection UAVs + ground delivery robots + fixed camera networks build true smart campus infrastructure.

scenariosMeta.title: Smart Agriculture
scenariosMeta.subtitle: SMART AGRICULTURE
scenariosMeta.description: Precision crop protection at 5× the speed of manual labor. Fully automated flight planning, precision variable-rate spraying, and real-time crop health monitoring deliver digital solutions for modern farming.

scenariosMeta.title: Mountain Logistics
scenariosMeta.subtitle: MOUNTAIN LOGISTICS
scenariosMeta.description: Breaking the last-mile barrier in remote areas. Heavy-lift UAVs paired with all-terrain vehicles overcome mountains, forests, and snow-covered terrain for efficient, precise cargo delivery.
